data.name: My Dragon Idol
data.detailed_description:
Step into the role of a therapist for Vanessa, a dragon-girl idol at the peak of her career. But behind the spotlight lies a world of hidden struggles: crippling anxiety, relentless pressure, creative burnout, and the isolation of stardom. It's up to you to be her anchor, helping her navigate these challenges and reclaim her inner fire.

Core Gameplay

  • Narrative: Make meaningful choices that influence her - nurture her gently or push her out of the comfort zone.

  • Intimacy: As trust builds, unlock sensual scenes that evolve from tender moments to passionate encounters. Unlock them in order of your choice!

  • Minigames: Engage in relaxing exercises to reduce her stress level. Each time you make major progress, you will look deeper into her psyche, uncovering layers of her personality and story.

Story and Themes

Vanessa is a complex character with a voice that enchants millions. Your sessions reveal her vulnerabilities: the weight of expectations from fans and manager, and a side she can't show in public. Will you help her overcome these to become an even greater icon, or will your relationship blur professional lines into something personal?

data.short_description: Adult-Only Stat Raising Dating Sim where you help a celebrity struggling with the other side of fame.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 support
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Full Vulkan 1.0 support or Direct3D 12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux distribution released after 2018
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 support
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Full Vulkan 1.0 support or Direct3D 12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
